codeReview.summary: Minimal, correct source change: replaced an empty line in src/skills.ts with `join(searchPath, '.devin/skills')` in the prioritySearchDirs array, maintaining alphabetical order (.continue → .devin → .github). New test file tests/devin-discovery.test.ts adds 5 well-structured tests across 2 describe blocks covering: single skill discovery, multiple skills, cross-agent discovery alongside .claude/skills, deduplication when same skill exists in .agents/skills and .devin/skills, and a source-level verification that the string exists in src/skills.ts. Tests use proper temp directory setup/teardown (beforeEach/afterEach with mkdirSync/rmSync). Commit also includes mission infrastructure updates (handoffs for devin-unit-tests, scrutiny/user-testing validators, progress log entries) which are standard workflow artifacts. All 424 tests pass, no new type errors, formatting clean.

summary: Feature adds '.devin/skills' to the prioritySearchDirs array in src/skills.ts (1-line change) and 5 discovery tests in tests/devin-discovery.test.ts. The change is alphabetically positioned, consistent with AGENTS.md and architecture.md guidance, and verified by comprehensive tests. No code quality issues, no dead code, no missing error handling. Pass.
